item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Also: shouldn't this SCP be pending reclassification to neutralized, since all its anomalous effects ceased?
(Apologies for double posting, only discovered the magic of editing after the fact)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Pro tip: don't try to include foreign languages if the only source available to you is machine translation. The atrocious Russian took me out of it. Also, the names were… Serbian? Not sure if that was intentional.
Good stuff otherwise, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Something appears to be wrong with the image under Operation Dust Bust

I loved this, the dialogue was especially crisp and the body horror was terrific

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was a really fun read! A lot of punch gets packed into what feels like a small space. The description of that "web" got an actual physical reaction from me; I adore all the body horror and Sarkic goodness going on here.

Going through a second time with the note in mind, I also think it works with that theme. "Take something terrible but mundane and make it weird and worse to highlight how already fucked it is" is an effective device when used well, and you've made it feel really natural with the universe. There's a good balance; despite how heavy it is with its theme, it didn't feel like I was being beat over the head. It gives you a heavy feeling of bleakness.

I found this entire document very enticing and actually enjoyable to read, so a +1 for you.

Nitpick:
For the Video Log you have "Milo Igorvich crouching over body" I assume you meant "over a body"?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Maybe it's a little soon to release this? Just saying.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Don't do drugs.

Author's Note:
close

On a personal note, the heroin epidemic is something that has affected me most of my adult life. While I myself have never had a use issue– my wife, several ex's, and many close friends have struggled with and died from heroin addiction. The issue is a complex one with many causes and contributing factors some of these factors I wished to highlight in this piece. This is meant to be more than "anomalous meat heroin", rather highlight the vicious predatory attitude the people who peddle this shit take. Using disgusting tactics to ensure people stay hooked. Their greed and disregard for human life are echoed by prescription drug companies that contributed to the rise of opiate abuse. All of this is compounded by the governments ludicrous handling of the "war on drugs", which frequently only makes things worse– especially for addicts in need of help not punishment. Anyway, that's all I really have to say, and seriously, don't do drugs.


images
boop

Brown powder: https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Fishmeal_powder.jpg
Man with necrosis: https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Acral_necrosis_due_to_bubonic_plague.jpg
Black powder: https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Powder_steel.jpg
Compound: https://commons.m.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Aerial_view_of_the_new_Bagram_Theater_Internment_Facility.jpg
PoI: https://ccsearch.creativecommons.org/photos/d2c31ba7-92fd-4bdb-8790-69b6c7ded844

Crit Credit: MalyceGraves, Doctor Fullham, Cyvstvi13, Nagiros . I know there are people I forgot– if you poke me I can safe you.
